title: Furry In Sky
description: This resource pack adds furry in sky.
body:
Furry In Sky

![visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d2da26f253a388ac97b2b92ddd939cb6afc9ba1.png)
# About the resource pack:
This resource pack changes the sky in the Overworld, replacing the sky texture with a completely white one featuring a pixelated furry.

Suitable for furry fans.

Need: **Optifine** or **Skyboxify**
# Note:
Please do not install this resource pack together with other similar ones to avoid conflicts.
